description:
Learn how 3M uses a parallel serverless architecture to securely serve materials science information to a global team of scientists and business analysts. 

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture #Serverless
fulltitle: 3M: Parallel Serverless Workflows for Materials Science
